resource.manifest:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{inputs.parameters.name}}
  labels:
    app: replayer
    workflows.argoproj.io/workflow: {{workflow.name}}
spec:
  replicas: {{=fromJSON(inputs.parameters.podReplicas)}}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: replayer
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: replayer
        workflows.argoproj.io/workflow: {{workflow.name}}
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: argo-workflow-executor
      containers:
        - name: replayer
          image: "{{inputs.parameters.imageTrafficReplayerLocation}}"
          imagePullPolicy: "{{inputs.parameters.imageTrafficReplayerPullPolicy}}"
          args:
            - ---INLINE-JSON
            - "{{=toBase64(inputs.parameters.jsonConfig)}}"
          resources: {{=fromJSON(inputs.parameters.resources)}}
          env:
            - name: TARGET_USERNAME
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: "{{=((0 == len(inputs.parameters.basicAuthSecretName)) ? ('empty') : (inputs.parameters.basicAuthSecretName))}}"
                  key: username
                  optional: true
            - name: TARGET_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: "{{=((0 == len(inputs.parameters.basicAuthSecretName)) ? ('empty') : (inputs.parameters.basicAuthSecretName))}}"
                  key: password
                  optional: true
            - name: JDK_JAVA_OPTIONS
              value: "{{=inputs.parameters.jvmArgs + ' ' + ((!('' == inputs.parameters.loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap)) ? ('-Dlog4j2.configurationFile=/config/logConfiguration') : (''))}}"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: log4j-configuration
              mountPath: /config/logConfiguration
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: log4j-configuration
          configMap:
            name: "{{=((0 == len(inputs.parameters.loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap)) ? ('default-log4j-config') : (inputs.parameters.loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap))}}"
            optional: {{=!(!('' == inputs.parameters.loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap))}}

parameters.name: jsonConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.merge(sprig.merge(sprig.merge(sprig.dict("targetUri", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)['endpoint'], "insecure", sprig.dig('allowInsecure', false, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig))), (('authConfig' in fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)) ? ((('sigv4' in fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)['authConfig']) ? (sprig.dict("sigv4AuthHeaderServiceRegion", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)['authConfig']['sigv4']['service']+','+fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)['authConfig']['sigv4']['region'])) : ({}))) : ({}))), sprig.omit(fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions), 'jvmArgs', 'loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap', 'podReplicas', 'resources')), sprig.dict("kafkaTrafficBrokers", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaConfig)['kafkaConnection'], "kafkaTrafficTopic", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaConfig)['kafkaTopic'], "kafkaTrafficGroupId", inputs.parameters.kafkaGroupId)))}}
